reasoning: Multiple highly credible news sources from March and April 2026 (including NYT, Reuters, NBC, CBS) discuss ongoing tensions and strikes between the US and Iran but explicitly state that ground troops have not yet been deployed. In March 2026, the Trump administration was reported to be weighing options for ground deployments or special forces, conclusively demonstrating that no action to establish control over any portion of Iran occurred in 2025. Furthermore, statements from Vice President JD Vance in June 2025 explicitly rejected the idea of putting "boots on the ground." Therefore, it is virtually certain that the US did not invade Iran in 2025.
